Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_AppleProResRAWHQ

A type that identifies the Apple ProRes RAW HQ format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_AppleProResRAWHQ: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
